attachmentPoints.description: A list of the capping group present at each location where the monomer can form a bond with other monomers

calculatedMolecularWeight.description: The molecular weight of the monomer as calculated by RDKit based on the monomer chemical structure

canonicalSmiles.description: The canonicalized chemical structure in SMILES format.

customMolecularWeight.description: Optional molecular weight value that the user can provide to override the calculated molecular weight

exactMolecularWeight.description: The exact molecular weight of the monomer as calculated by RDKit based on the monomer chemical structure

modifiedAt.description: DateTime the monomer was last modified.

naturalAnalog.description: Symbol for the natural equivalent of the monomer. Acceptable natural analog values include IUPAC bases, r, and p.

originalSmiles.description: The original chemical structure supplied by the user in SMILES format. Null if the user did not originally supply SMILES.

symbol.description: User-defined identifier of the monomer, unique on the monomer type.

visualColor.description: The hex color code of the monomer visual symbol
